mapper.insert: insert into document_activity_logs (document_activity_log_id, company_id, document_id, action, actor_user_id, detail_json, created_at) values (#{documentActivityLogId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{companyId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{documentId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{action,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{actorUserId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{detailJson,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR}, #{createdAt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP})
